3286000.name: Evil Siege
3286000.description:
Overview:
Step into the immersive world of Evil Siege, a heart-pounding Virtual Reality experience where you play as a warrior defending your base against relentless waves of monsters. Armed with a variety of weapons like the Bow, Spear, Axe, Forge, and Kunai, you must strategically build and upgrade defensive towers, including Arrow, Stone Ball, and Laser towers.

Each phase presents three intense waves of enemies, each with unique health, speed, and damage stats. Collect resources from fallen foes to purchase new weapons and fortify your defenses, but choose wisely—each decision could mean the difference between survival and defeat. Use your teleportation ability to outmaneuver enemies and stop them from reaching your base.

Do you have what it takes to survive the siege? Protect your base, eliminate your enemies, and experience the ultimate VR battle.
3286000.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
